title: Reset Device - Clear Trusted Devices - Clear - No
scenario: "Clear Trusted Devices" confirmation popup "No" button closes popup without clearing devices and headset remains connected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → Device Settings → Reset Device.
4. Observe the confirmation popup that appears, warning that device power off is required and activity/calls may be interrupted.
expected: The confirmation popup closes without clearing trusted devices, and the headset remains connected.
